input.repo_state: A reviewer re-read a full command file that was already supplied in the diff and gave no read reason.
input.review_focus: Flag unjustified full-file re-reads during review.
input.state_ref: Transcript: diff included the command asset. Reviewer action: Read full model-benchmark.md again. No reason was stated before the read.

tests.name: visible full re-read without reason
tests.reviewer_output:
VERDICT: FAIL
Finding: unjustified full-file read; state the read reason and avoid re-reading diff-provided content.

hidden_tests.name: hidden duplicate asset read

input.repo_state: The asset was newly opened in the current review, then opened again in full with no stated reason.
input.review_focus: Catch repeat full-content reads unless a blocker verification reason is stated.
input.state_ref: Transcript: Read YAML asset lines 1-220, then Read same YAML asset lines 1-220 again. No reason before second read.

hidden_tests.reviewer_output:
VERDICT: FAIL
Finding: repeat read lacks a stated reason; this violates read-budget discipline.
